title: KYC Document Intake Support
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted KYC document intake has required document, screening, risk, privacy, and compliance-review evidence before the workflow is marked ready for human decision.

sources.label: National Bank of Cambodia Technology and Cyber Risk Management Guidelines

evidence.title: Identity document reference recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record document type and internal reference; avoid exposing full ID numbers in agent-visible notes.

evidence.title: Document authenticity check logged
evidence.recommendation: Record that document quality, expiry, tamper signs, and consistency checks were completed.

evidence.title: Customer liveness or presence check logged
evidence.recommendation: Record required liveness, branch presence, or verified remote onboarding evidence.

evidence.title: Address or contact verification completed
evidence.recommendation: Record verified contact, address, or other bank-required customer profile evidence.

evidence.title: Sanctions and PEP screening reference recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record screening reference and status without placing sensitive screening details into prompts.

evidence.title: Beneficial owner information captured where applicable
evidence.recommendation: For business customers, record beneficial ownership collection status and missing items.

evidence.title: Risk rating draft prepared
evidence.recommendation: The agent may draft a risk rating summary, but a qualified human must make the final decision.

evidence.title: Privacy minimization check completed
evidence.recommendation: Confirm only necessary customer data is included in the workflow and logs.

approvals.title: Compliance review approval recorded
approvals.recommendation: A compliance reviewer must approve before the workflow is marked ready for human KYC decision.

thresholds.title: Missing KYC documents require review
thresholds.recommendation: Do not mark intake ready while required KYC documents are missing.

thresholds.title: Screening hits require compliance review
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate any sanctions, PEP, adverse media, or screening hit to compliance.

blockedActions.title: AI agent cannot approve KYC
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to make a final KYC approval decision.
blockedActions.recommendation: Keep the agent limited to evidence collection and draft summaries; require authorized human approval.

blockedActions.title: KYC intake cannot be marked ready without compliance review
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to mark KYC intake ready without compliance review approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Collect missing evidence and record compliance review before marking ready.

blockedActions.title: KYC intake cannot proceed while screening hits are unresolved
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to proceed while screening hits still need compliance review.
blockedActions.recommendation: Escalate screening hits and record compliance disposition.
